title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Toki, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Chopper as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place, grand city, is home to many people.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And that big building over there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hello, everyone!! My name is Koby!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Straw Hat!! You're going down today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's like this every day here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop being so loud in the hall- way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you two gonna destroy the classroom again!? Do that on the play- ground!! Go outside!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've got you cornered, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't make me battle on you to the teachers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are so many interesting and fun classmates here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're in Middle School now... act your age...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, Nami-Sannnico let's go study together for the "test of love"!!!??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yay! ) let's have lots of fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What happened to keeping it calm!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right!! Kobby-Kun, come join in the fun!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
